name: Impossible Beef Enchilada Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Brown the hamburger with onions and drain excess grease.
4. Stir in garlic, chili powder, oregano, salt, pepper, and half of the Enchilada sauce.
5. Sprinkle crushed tortilla chips evenly over the bottom of the pie plate.
6. Top with shredded cheese; spread with meat mixture.
7. In a separate bowl, beat milk, eggs, and Bisquick until smooth (15 seconds in blender on high).
8. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
10. Spread remaining Enchilada sauce over top; sprinkle with remaining cheese.
11. Bake for an additional 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
12. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving. Optional: Top with sour cream.
